input: user-item interaction graph and user-user social graph
output: predicted rating scores for user-item pairs
backbone: graph neural network with diffusion (recursive aggregation) and readout
loss: three losses: recommendation loss, contrastive loss, and social loss (specifics not detailed in abstract)
key_idea: combine social information and contrastive learning via a diffusion-readout-prediction framework with asymmetric readout (average user embeddings across layers, last-layer item embeddings)
datasets: three benchmark datasets (not named in abstract)
